summary: The user sought information on the F-Stop Loka UL 40L camera backpack and later discussed their recent trip to Yosemite with a new Sony lens. They also inquired about the Gitzo GT3543LS tripod, organized photography gear storage solutions, camera sensor cleaning tips, and selling their old Sony RX100 Mark IV online.
facts: The user is looking for the F-Stop Loka UL 40L camera backpack.
The user recently returned from a weekend trip to Yosemite with their new Sony FE 24-70mm f/2.8 GM lens, which they purchased on February 10th.
The user is considering the Gitzo GT3543LS tripod for its stability and performance.
The user is interested in organizing their photography gear storage at home.
The user is looking into Pelican Cases and Stack-On Cabinets for photography gear storage.
The user has been putting off cleaning their camera sensors for weeks due to dust spots appearing in their photos.
The user is planning to start cleaning their camera sensor with an air blower.
The user is thinking of selling their old Sony RX100 Mark IV, which they haven't used in over a year.
The user plans to try selling their Sony RX100 Mark IV on eBay and Facebook Marketplace.
